nodes.label: AIBrix KVCache as L3 KV Cache
HF3FS as L3 Global KV Cache

edges.rationale: entrypoint calls BundleMatcher to match tensor bundles.
AlignerEntrypointExecutor calls SmartExecutor for token alignment.
SmartPlanner uses SeqInfoBuilder to construct sequence info.
SmartExecutor uses SmartAuxLoader for auxiliary data.
UnsharderExecutor uses ParallelInfo to determine concat/pick/reduce.
UnsharderPlanner uses ParallelInfo for grouping coordinates.
DimsParser uses DimParser for individual dimensions.
DimsParser uses ModifierParser for dimension modifiers.
DimsParser uses CommentParser for inline comments.
TensorComparator results are formatted by TensorComparatorFormatter.
Simulator uses BaseRouter to route requests.
Simulator uses BaseScheduler to schedule GPUs.
CodePatcher uses SourceEditor to modify source text.
CodePatcher uses SourcePatcherTypes for type safety.
MMEncoder produces embeddings consumed by MMReceiverBase.
get_kv_class selects implementation based on TransferBackend enum value.
MetadataBuffers uses ReqToMetadataIdxAllocator for index management.
BlockStored is a KV event type.
BlockRemoved is a KV event type.
AllBlocksCleared is a KV event type.
Visualization is optional end stage of pipeline.
DisaggregatedServing uses TransferBackend for KV movement.
DisaggregatedServing may include multimodal encoder server.
TransferBackendAbstraction is represented by TransferBackend enum.
DataLoader feeds real traces into ScheduleSimulation.
DataSynthesis feeds synthetic workloads into ScheduleSimulation.
TensorDumpForwardHook produces dumps consumed by DumpLoader.
Parsed logs may feed into comparison pipeline for text divergence.
Text comparison may be part of overall debug comparison.
DecodeScheduleBatchMixin likely extends decode disaggregation mixin.
DPUtils may be used by SmartPlanner for sequence matching.
MetaOverrider modifies metadata in comparison pipeline.
OutputTypes defines types used by OutputFormatter.

StandaloneDraftWorker parallels StandaloneWorker but for V2

May use external corpus manager for SAM
Captured by EAGLEWorker for draft forward
DraftBackendFactory used to create draft attention backend
Both provide Triton kernels for speculative decoding
Uses config registry and download helpers

hyperedges.label: Batch Overlap (TBO) Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Two-batch overlap (TBO) scheduling and execution for overlapping communication and computation in decoder layers.

hyperedges.label: Piecewise Compilation Subsystem
hyperedges.description: torch.fx-based piecewise compilation with per-shape CUDA graph capture and inductor integration.

hyperedges.label: Model Configuration Registry
hyperedges.description: Centralized model configuration classes extending HuggingFace PretrainedConfig for SGLang-supported architectures.

hyperedges.label: Remote Connector Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Abstraction layer for remote model weight loading via S3, Redis, and remote instance connectors with serialization support.

hyperedges.label: Constrained Decoding Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Grammar-guided constrained decoding supporting JSON schema, regex, EBNF, and structural tags via multiple backends (XGrammar, Outlines, llguidance).

hyperedges.label: Debug Utilities Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Tensor dumping, cross-system grafting, and dump comparison utilities for debugging distributed inference.

hyperedges.rationale: End-to-end tensor comparison pipeline: load -> match -> align -> compare -> visualize.
Disaggregated serving architecture: prefill, decode, transfer backend, multimodal encoder, receiver, and KV events.
Schedule simulation components: simulator, router, scheduler, GPU state, metrics, and requests.

hyperedges.label: Disaggregation (PD Separation) Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Prefill-Decode disaggregation with multiple transfer backends: Common (staging buffers), Fake (local testing), Mooncake (RDMA), Mori (IOEngine), and NIXL (memory registration).

hyperedges.label: Distributed Communication Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Multi-backend distributed communication supporting CUDA/ROCm/MUSA custom all-reduce, NCCL via pynccl, MSCCL++, Mooncake RDMA transfer, shared-memory broadcast, and HPU/NPU/XPU communicators.

hyperedges.label: Diffusion LLM (DLLM) Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Diffusion-based LLM scheduling with JointThreshold and LowConfidence token selection algorithms, integrated into the scheduler via mixins.

hyperedges.label: Elastic Expert Parallelism Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Elastic EP state management for dynamic rank scaling, with expert backup client and manager for weight redistribution across nodes.

hyperedges.label: API Entrypoints Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Engine lifecycle management, HTTP/gRPC servers, OpenAI/Anthropic/Ollama API routing, SSL hot-reload, Harmony context/tool integration, warmup routines, and load metrics.

hyperedges.label: OpenAI-Compatible API Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Full OpenAI-compatible API implementation including chat completions, embeddings, reranking, scoring, tokenization, transcription with Whisper/Qwen3 adapters, DeepSeek-V3.2/V4 encoding, and streaming ASR.

hyperedges.label: Anthropic-Compatible API Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Anthropic-compatible API protocol and serving layer.

hyperedges.label: Ollama-Compatible API Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Ollama-compatible API protocol, serving layer, and smart router for model selection.

hyperedges.label: Expert Parallel Load Balancing (EPLB) Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Expert-parallel load balancing with DeepSeek hierarchical rebalancing, vectorized chunking, elasticity-aware algorithms considering active ranks, and expert location metadata management.

hyperedges.label: Environment Configuration
hyperedges.description: Centralized environment variable configuration with EnvBool, EnvInt, EnvStr definitions for SGLang runtime tuning.

hyperedges.label: Function Call Parsing Framework
hyperedges.description: Model-specific function call format detection and parsing framework supporting 25+ detector implementations.

hyperedges.label: MLX Backend (Apple Silicon)
hyperedges.description: Apple Silicon backend using MLX framework with lazy evaluation, overlap scheduling, and contiguous KV cache management.

hyperedges.label: MUSA Backend (Moore Threads GPU)
hyperedges.description: Moore Threads GPU backend with FlashAttention3 wrapper, top-k kernels, and context parallel utilities.

hyperedges.label: NPU/Ascend Backend
hyperedges.description: Huawei Ascend NPU backend with FIA attention, graph runners for Eagle/ViT, MLA preprocessing, fused MoE quantization, and Qwen VL processing.

hyperedges.label: NPU Attention Backend Variants
hyperedges.description: Multiple attention backend implementations for NPU: standard Ascend, GDN (grouped dot-product attention), hybrid linear attention, and torch-native fallback.

hyperedges.label: NPU Quantization Methods
hyperedges.description: NPU-specific quantization for fused MoE (W4A4, W8A8, W4A8, W4A16) and linear layers (W8A8 Int8, W4A4 Dynamic).

hyperedges.label: NPU Graph Runners
hyperedges.description: NPU graph capture runners for standard inference, Eagle speculative decoding draft, and ViT encoding.

hyperedges.label: Core Neural Network Layers
hyperedges.description: Fundamental neural network layer implementations including multi-platform activations, normalization, tensor-parallel linear layers, and embedding variants.

hyperedges.label: Attention Layer Ecosystem
hyperedges.description: Attention mechanism implementations including radix caching, linear attention variants, backend registry, and DP attention with communication fusion.

hyperedges.label: Tensor Parallelism Infrastructure
hyperedges.description: Tensor parallelism support with column/row parallel linear layers, communication orchestration, and parameter loading for quantized weights.

hyperedges.label: Quantization Layer Support
hyperedges.description: Quantization utilities including int4/fp8 packing, ModelOpt constants, torchao integration, AWQ kernels, and parameter classes for vLLM-compatible loading.

hyperedges.label: Multi-Head Compression (MHC) Subsystem
hyperedges.description: DeepSeek V4 Multi-Head Compression with tilelang kernels for Sinkhorn normalization, fused pre/post processing, and hc_head LM-head mixer.

hyperedges.label: Logits Processing and Sampling Pipeline
hyperedges.description: End-to-end logits processing with chunked logprob computation, multi-item scoring, and multi-backend sampling (flashinfer, pytorch, ascend).

hyperedges.label: Gemma 4 Optimizations
hyperedges.description: Gemma 4-specific fused triton kernels (RMSNorm+residual+scalar) and clippable linear layers with per-tensor activation clamping.

hyperedges.label: Multimodal Layer Support
hyperedges.description: Multimodal processing including GPU tensor hashing and NPU-specific Qwen VL image/video preprocessing with patch flattening.

hyperedges.label: DeepGEMM JIT compilation wrappers and kernel entrypoints
Triton fused MoE kernels and configuration management
AWQ quantization schemes and Triton kernels
CompressedTensors quantization framework with scheme detection
Expert parallelism MoE layers and dispatchers

hyperedges.description: These classes implement the different attention forward variants selectable via AttnForwardMethod enum.
EVS pipeline: compute retention mask, prune embeddings, adjust prompt placeholders.
BaseMultimodalProcessor is the abstract base; concrete processors extend it for specific models.
PDMux system: scheduler mixin, config, SM division, and stream group initialization.
Penalty library subsystem with individual penalties and an orchestrator.
Observability stack: latency timers, CPU monitoring, metrics collection and export.
Ray-based distributed execution stack: controller, engine, HTTP server, scheduler actor.
Family of speculative decoding algorithms: EAGLE, Standalone, Frozen-KV MTP, Multi-layer EAGLE, DFlash, NGRAM
SpecInput hierarchy: base class, EAGLE variants, DFlash, Frozen-KV MTP, Ngram
CUDA graph capture and replay runners for speculative draft and extend phases
Top-k index capture infrastructure for indexer and routed experts
HuggingFace transformers loading and compatibility layer
Large cluster of utility modules that depend on or re-export utils/common.py
Offloading infrastructure using host-shared memory and CPU/sharded-GPU offload
Weight synchronization pipeline: flatten tensors and gather across TP ranks
HTTP authentication and middleware patching for FastAPI/Starlette
Profiling and observability tools: torch profiler, trace merging, RPD conversion, NVTX hooks, device timers
Structured logging infrastructure for requests and scheduler status
Tokenizer backends: tiktoken custom tokenizer, HF tokenizer loader with patches
